title: Top Senate Democrat says ‘House Republicans caved’ as deal to fund DHS moves forward – as it happened
summary_full: This live blog is now closed.Republican leaders agree to advance funding deal to end DHS shutdownSign up for the Breaking News US emailWe’re starting to get pictures from outside the US supreme court ahead of oral arguments in Trump v Barbara, which will decide if the administration’s attempts to restrict birthright citizenship are unconstitutional.Donald Trump has just arrived, and plans to listen to arguments at the court – the first time a sitting president has attended arguments.
